iteration_1.notes: Baseline run. All automated tests pass. LLM judge gave 0.5/1.0 for overall-quality on document-xlsx due to missing currency formatting and column widths.

iteration_2.notes: Added rule #6 requiring professional formatting (currency format, column widths). Updated worked example to include currency formatting and column width settings. Both tasks now score 100.

changes_made: Added critical rule #6: always apply professional formatting (currency format $#,##0, column widths, bold headers)
Updated worked example to include currency formatting on all numeric cells and column width settings
